examples: The Marchioness Manson shook her head softly.
Mother's not here, or the Marchioness--or anybodybut me.
Bowbelle was owned by East Coast Aggregates and managed by South Coast Shipping, while the Marchioness was owned and managed by Tidal Cruises.
This inquiry was prompted by families' concerns when they learnt that the hands of around half the Marchioness victims had been removed for identification purposes.
